formulas.name: gypsumBoardProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: insulationProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: LightGaugeSteelProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: otherProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: readyMixedConcreteProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: rebarProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: structuralProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseKentouHoryu} > 0, "検討保留", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseNull} > 0, "-", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseTeianHuka} > 0, "提案不可", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseX} > 0, "X", NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

Flow.label: 【提案商品/取引先】6カテ商品提案状況記録
